strengths: Strong SQL and Python technical expertise
Proven automation and ETL pipeline delivery
Experience with cloud data platforms (BigQuery, Snowflake)

weaknesses: No explicit Model Risk Management (MRM) experience

improvement_bullets: Standardized organizational KPIs and data governance frameworks to ensure cross-functional alignment, resulting in a consistent "single source of truth" for all business stakeholders and a reduction in report discrepancies, demonstrating foundational understanding of governance principles.
Developed Power BI and Looker workflows to replace manual written reporting, reducing data mismatches and improving work efficiency by 40%, showcasing analytical rigor in process enhancement.

Built Python automation for weekly sales and operations reports (ingesting POS and CRM data), saving 8 hours per week and improving reporting accuracy, highlighting data pipeline and automation skills.

Integrated multiple datasets from APIs and PostgreSQL warehouses to build structured data, supporting more robust downstream analytics and reporting, demonstrating experience with APIs and system integrations.

Modeled raw API data into a dbt star schema to optimize query performance, greatly lowering load times through BigQuery partitioning and clustering, which supports performance optimization for data models and pipelines.

Dear Hiring Manager,

I am particularly drawn to Capgemini's mission of helping organizations accelerate their dual transition to a digital and sustainable world, and I am eager to contribute my skills to unlocking the value of technology for leading organizations.

In my previous roles, I have developed and optimized data pipelines, built automation scripts to improve efficiency, and translated complex technical findings into actionable business recommendations. My experience in developing Python automation for weekly reports, ingesting data from various sources and saving significant hours per week, demonstrates my ability to build efficient data workflows. Furthermore, my work in optimizing relational database queries using CTEs, window functions, and joins showcases my expert-level SQL skills and ability to handle complex data manipulation. While my resume may not explicitly use "Model Risk Management" terminology, my experience in standardizing organizational KPIs and data governance frameworks, coupled with my role in translating technical findings into business recommendations, has provided me with a strong foundation in understanding governance principles and identifying areas for improvement in data processes. I am a quick learner and adept at understanding new domain-specific requirements, including regulatory expectations, to convert ambiguous business needs into structured, data-driven analytical tasks.

I am particularly drawn to Capgemini's mission of unlocking the value of technology to address the entire breadth of business needs and believe my experience in data analysis, automation, and building robust data solutions would allow me to contribute meaningfully from day one.
